title: UPSC CDS Exam: Smart Guide to General Knowledge and English
author: DefenceRoger Editorial
data: The Combined Defence Services (CDS) exam, conducted twice a year by the UPSC, is a highly competitive entry for graduates wishing to join the IMA, INA, AFA, or OTA. Cracking the English paper requires strong grammar, consistent practice of spotting errors, and reading comprehension. For General Knowledge, align your preparation with NCERTs for Science and History, and keep track of national and international current affairs. Solving mock tests under timed conditions will dramatically improve your speed and accuracy.

content.text: The Combined Defence Services (CDS) exam, conducted twice a year by the UPSC, is a highly competitive entry for graduates wishing to join the IMA, INA, AFA, or OTA.
Cracking the English paper requires strong grammar, consistent practice of spotting errors, and reading comprehension.
For General Knowledge, align your preparation with NCERTs for Science and History, and keep track of national and international current affairs.
Solving mock tests under timed conditions will dramatically improve your speed and accuracy.
